query: SELECT id, productCode, poNumber, vendorName, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, sheetRowNumber, currentStationCode, currentStatus, archivedAt, updatedAt FROM products WHERE batchNo IN ('00500025407','00500025410') ORDER BY batchNo ASC, archivedAt ASC, id ASC;
